title: Michelle W Bowman: Artificial intelligence in the financial system
body:
Speech by Ms Michelle W Bowman, Vice Chair for Supervision of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at the Financial Stability Oversight Council Artificial Intelligence Series Roundtable on Cybersecurity and Risk Management, Washington DC, 1 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260504b.htm

title: John C Williams: There is no try
body:
Remarks by Mr John C Williams, President and Chief Executive Officer of the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, at the Cynosure Group Spring Symposium, New York City, 4 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260505e.htm

title: Sergio Nicoletti Altimari: The Italian financial system - stability, innovation, and the road ahead
body:
Keynote speech by Mr Sergio Nicoletti Altimari, Deputy Governor of the Bank of Italy, at Villa Firenze Talks at Embassy of Italy to the United States, Washington DC, 20 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260427a.htm
